thematicPivot.from: Boutique organic dairy storefront (paid product brand)
thematicPivot.to: The Butterfly House at Srinivas Farm — a small community farm and sanctuary for abandoned children and elders
thematicPivot.noteFromUser: Small operation, a few gallons of milk, surplus shared with the community and the residents of the Butterfly House. Vegetables and fruit grown on-site are donated.

brand.name: The Butterfly House at Srinivas Farm
brand.tagline: Where Wings Rest and Roots Run Deep
brand.voice: Quiet, sincere, plain-spoken. No marketing. No prices.

uniqueSignatures: Drifting butterfly canvas (replaces pollen) — multi-colour wings flapping across the page
Two-wing Butterfly House section (Children's east wing + Elders' west wing)
Living "This Morning on the Farm" hero card (gallons / baskets / plates served)
Community Impact counter on a forest-green slab with monarch wing motif
Honest FAQ that includes "Why call it the Butterfly House?"
sections: Heritage Timeline (1975 → today, including founder's story)
About / A Letter from the Founder
The Small Herd (cows · calves · garden helpers)
The Butterfly House (Children's wing + Elders' wing)
The Community Table (Milk · Vegetables · Fruits · Seasonal — tabbed)
Voices From The House (carousel — child + elder + neighbour)
Get Involved (contact form with shelter-relevant inquiry types)
knownGaps: Hero / OG / family portraits use Unsplash placeholders — swap with real photos of the founder, the children (with consent / silhouetted as appropriate), the elders, the cows, and the garden
Display typeface is Crimson Pro (serif) — retained from earlier brief; could swap to a softer humanist serif or hand-drawn display if desired
No bespoke logo SVG — currently using a small inline butterfly mark in the header
No Dialog modals (e.g., for caretaker bios)
No real donation processor — contact form routes everyone to the Get Involved inbox
